en.extract:
The black berrypecker (Melanocharis nigra) is a species of bird in the family Melanocharitidae.
It is found in New Guinea.
Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest.

The '''black berrypecker''' ('''''Melanocharis nigra''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Melanocharitidae]].
It is found in [[New Guinea]].
Its natural [[habitat]] is [[subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest]].
